name: wakewait
description: Efficient local waiting for agent CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Efficient local waiting for agent CLIs.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait provides a default Codex waiting skill and a small local CLI for efficient waiting: near-native local sleep with wall-clock state, persisted recovery for interrupted waits, deterministic file/text/command rules for wait-for, and fixed log health scans without model calls during the wait loop.
defaultPrompt: Install WakeWait and verify the wakewait skill works.
Use WakeWait for a long training job with local fixed-rule waits.
Check and cancel persisted WakeWait tasks.
